calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools is Monday, August 25, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools is Wednesday, June 10, 2026. The school year runs from August through June, covering 185 instructional days.

yearNumbers.label: Good Friday
yearNumbers.detail: Good Friday (Apr 3) is observed as a school holiday the Friday before Spring Break begins (Apr 6–10), creating a 6-day break window.

calendarNotes: Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools begins the 2025–2026 school year on August 25, 2025 — the latest start among North Carolina's large districts. Good Friday (April 3) is observed as a school holiday the Friday before Spring Break begins (April 6–10). The school year ends June 10, 2026.
